---
title: "Alaina-Lawrence"
  type: website
  output-dir: docs
  
image: 
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alaina-lawrence-57a620180/ 
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/the-lawrence
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:alaina.k.lawrence@gmail.com

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

git add assignment_kenya_climate.Rmd
